race.comment: BRIGHT THE SUN (11) improving mare set to peak for this after she raced without luck when ninth over 1810m at Eagle Farm in C3 class. Claim helps and can finish over the top of these. CHAMPAGNE ROUGE (9) good win two-back then sent to town with a fast finishing third over 2070m at Doomben. Will be tough to hold out again. FULMEN FILOU (1) won two-in-a-row before heading to town with a struggling seventh over 2200m at Eagle Farm. Winning apprentice back on and gets his chance. ALDEENAARY (5) much better effort when he launched late for a tidy third over 2050m at the Gold Coast. A repeat effort keeps him in the calculations.
